subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Nubuvvat-i-Khassih (Treatise on Specific Prophethood)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God who made the ornament of the Tablets the Book of Authorization which is the ornament of the Point singled out after such was willed and decreed  [by God]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی جعل طراز الواح کتاب الاذن طراز النقطة التی عینت بعد ما شیئت
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @symbolism, @prophecy and fulfillment, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @Muhammad; Islam, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @innateness; early self-awareness of the Manifestations of God, @impossibility of true worship of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @self-description of God; God's self-remembrance
